title: polygala cruciata var. cuspidata
intro: Polygala cruciata var. cuspidata is a variant of the Polygala cruciata plant, a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is primarily found in North America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving cough relief. Herbal preparations of Polygala cruciata var. cuspidata often involve drying and processing the roots, leaves, or flowers into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
